payload.notes: Follow-up to US-068/US-069 after live QA found Done-column cards horizontally bounded but vertically over-compressed into clipped strips. Scope is UI-only card/list layout; no API, database, run-state, review, recovery, or sync behavior changes.
payload.summary: Make dense Done-column task cards readable without losing bounded board behavior

payload.notes: E08 Symphony Web UI Controller follow-up for Done-column card readability after live QA and image preview.
payload.title: Readable Done Column Task Cards
payload.verify_command: env -u HARNESS_DB_PATH -u HARNESS_RUN_ID -u HARNESS_RUN_MODE sh -c 'npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run build && npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run e2e && npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run desktop:smoke && git diff --check'

payload.actions_taken: ["read project-scoped harness-intake-griller skill","reviewed Harness matrix and E08 story lineage","created US-070 story packet","updated Symphony Web UI product contract and E08 story index","added semantic changeset for intake and story handoff"]
payload.decisions_made: ["classified as normal because it changes existing user-visible Web UI behavior with weak current proof","kept scope UI-only with no API database run-state review recovery or sync changes","made validation cover vertical readability as well as horizontal overflow"]
payload.harness_friction: No registered providers are present for design-validation accessibility or coverage, so the task uses Playwright screenshot and layout assertions as the planned proof.
payload.notes: Prepared planning artifacts only; did not start Symphony execution.
